title: crepis glabrata
intro: Crepis glabrata, also known as smooth hawk's beard, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Crepis glabrata has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and aiding in digestion. Crepis glabrata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be used to make capsules or tinctures for its medicinal and health benefits.
